data_layer: Gaia EDR3 profile percentiles and catalogue diagnostics
source_reference: Gaia EDR3 and published globular-cluster Gaia profile products used in the manuscript.
processing_note: Profile-level input tables are used as supplied in this release; Gaia radii are converted to arcsec within the MATLAB workflow.
redistribution_note: Retain original Gaia and catalogue-provider terms of use; cite upstream sources in any derivative work.

source_reference: HST/HACKS proper-motion dispersion products used as the high-resolution benchmark.
processing_note: The parser in src/convert_hacks_raw_to_csv.m converts the raw whitespace-delimited HACKS table into input/hacks_hst_dispersion_profiles.csv.
redistribution_note: Retain STScI/HST and HACKS acknowledgement/citation requirements.

source_reference: APOGEE DR17 globular-cluster value-added catalogue support layer.
processing_note: APOGEE quantities are retained only as spectroscopic-readiness metadata and do not enter the baseline Gaia--HST residual calculation.
redistribution_note: Retain SDSS/APOGEE data-use and acknowledgement requirements.

processing_note: Used to standardise cluster identifiers and preserve explicit thresholds/configuration.
redistribution_note: Workflow metadata created for this release.
